title: Bitmine Slows Ether Purchase Pace, Buying $53 Million Worth Last Week
summary: Bitmine, an Ethereum treasury firm, reduced weekly ether purchases by more than 75% after the previous week's aggressive buying. Last week, the firm bought $53 million worth of ETH, compared to 112,000 ETH (worth about $275 million at the time) the week before.
body:
Bitmine, a firm known for holding significant amounts of Ethereum on its balance sheet, has dramatically slowed its weekly ETH purchases. After acquiring 112,000 ETH in a single week—valued at approximately $275 million at the time—the company bought only $53 million worth of ether last week. This represents a reduction of more than 75% in its weekly spending on Ethereum.

The previous week's buying spree was notable not just for its size but also for its timing, occurring amid a period of volatility in the cryptocurrency markets. Bitmine's decision to scale back its purchases may indicate a strategic shift in response to market conditions or internal considerations. The firm has not publicly commented on the reasons behind the change.

For everyday Ethereum users and investors, this news highlights the influence of large institutional players on the market. While Bitmine's actions can impact ETH prices and market sentiment, the reduction in purchases could signal a cooling-off period or a temporary pause. The coming weeks will reveal whether this is a short-term adjustment or a longer-term trend.
twitterThread: Bitmine just slowed its ether purchases by more than 75% after a $275M buying spree. The firm bought 112,000 ETH last week, then only $53M worth this week. Market shift or strategy change?
Large institutional players like Bitmine can influence ether markets. Their sudden slowdown in purchases could signal caution or a rebalancing act. Either way, it’s a reminder of crypto’s volatility.

If you’re holding ETH, watch for Bitmine’s next move. Will they resume buying? Or is this a longer-term pullback? Stay tuned for updates. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-01-bitmine-cuts-ethereum-purchases-by-75-after-record-week
